inputs.shares_source: 38,477,789 common shares outstanding May 14, 2026 (Q1 2026 10-Q cover page)
inputs.cash_source: Cash and cash equivalents $15.185M at March 31, 2026 (Q1 10-Q balance sheet)
inputs.revenue_q1_source: Q1 2026 revenue $27.696M vs $16.471M Q1 2025 (Q1 10-Q income statement)
inputs.fcf_source: Q1 2026 cash used in operations ($10.454M) on 38.48M shares ≈ -$0.27/sh quarterly; excludes $21.4M non-cash warrant fair-value loss (Q1 10-Q cash flow and income statement)
inputs.normalization_note: Lawrence consolidated owner cash is negative during integration; stance uses dated equity-stub scenarios. GAAP net loss includes warrant mark-to-market not owner cash.

optionality_gate.notes: Cash $0.39/sh is liquidity not dhando floor; $64.9M warrant overhang and negative equity dominate bear case

segments_or_options.label: Drone Nerds commercial UAS distribution (83.4% stake)
segments_or_options.notes: FY2025 revenue $22.5M; Q1 2026 run-rate $110M annualized [Assumption] on fragmented distributor economics

segments_or_options.label: Autonomous Defense Systems division
segments_or_options.notes: No revenue to date; DARPA/AFRL relationships cited in 10-K; explicit zero in Lawrence base

segments_or_options.label: TriFan 600 VTOL program (paused)
segments_or_options.base_terminal_rationale: Program paused after Drone Nerds pivot; no near-term capital allocated per FY2025 10-K Business section
segments_or_options.notes: Legacy XTI aircraft IP retained but not in base cash path

segments_or_options.label: Cash and near-cash
segments_or_options.notes: Cash $15.2M at 3/31/2026; going-concern disclosure in FY2025 10-K

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Warrant liability settlement or conversion terms
Drone Nerds acquisition earn-out and minority buyout

bear.notes: Continued dilution from warrants and equity raises; operating burn exhausts cash; ADS and domestic manufacturing divisions produce no revenue

base.notes: Drone Nerds reaches low-single-digit operating margin on ~$80M revenue; warrant overhang resolved via conversion or repurchase; ADS remains option-only

lines.label: Drone Nerds normalized operating value
lines.source: ~$52M enterprise value on 83.4% stake at 0.6× revenue [Assumption]

lines.label: Probability-weighted ADS milestone (12% × $8)
lines.source: No SEC revenue; DARPA/AFRL pipeline cited 10-K [Assumption]

bull.notes: ADS wins initial procurement award; Drone Nerds margin expansion plus tuck-in M&A; domestic manufacturing division supplies NDAA-compliant platforms

base.source: Q1 2026 cash used in operations $10.454M ÷ 38.48M shares (Q1 10-Q); excludes non-cash warrant fair-value loss
Drone Nerds scale + modest margin; warrant overhang resolved [Assumption]

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Negative equity ($26.6M) vs $78M total assets; warrant liability $64.9M marks dilution not hidden land

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Distribution and defense services, not mineral royalty

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: ADS and domestic manufacturing divisions generate no revenue; operating loss $10.4M Q1 2026 (10-K Business; Q1 10-Q)

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Government UAS procurement pipeline cited in 10-K; no contracted backlog in filings

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: $2M strategic investment in Valkyrie Sciences Holdings LLC (8-K 2025-10-21)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Operating pivot, not suspended dividend trust

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Drone Nerds hardware, training, and repair services are consolidated revenue ($27.7M Q1 2026)

stance_proposal.override_reason: Revenue inflecting post-Drone Nerds but negative owner cash, warrant overhang, and negative equity cap stance at watch

blended.weights: 100% Marvin floor; no approved third party

growth_explanation.years_1_5: Drone Nerds revenue scale from Q1 2026 run-rate; margin improvement from services mix [Assumption]
growth_explanation.years_6_7: ADS optionality if procurement awards materialize; otherwise flat distribution economics

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
